validation: Trigger predictions recorded per query (manual prediction); empirical re-validation and an independent peer check remain a follow-up.
note: should_not_trigger here are mostly SINGLE-record-type jobs that should go straight to a DOMAIN skill, not the router. The router is for whole-mod integration and the gap mechanics.

should_trigger.query: I just installed a big follower mod (Lucien) and I want to make it fully compatible with Requiem — what does it all need?
Patch this whole armor-and-weapon mod for Requiem please, it adds like 40 records of different types.
How do I make my new quest mod play flawlessly with Requiem? It adds NPCs, a custom creature, some loot, and a couple spells.
What does MyNewMod.esp need to be Requiem-consistent? Can you go through it record by record?
I added a vampire-themed follower and some vampiric powers — how do I integrate the vampirism side with Requiem?
My mod adds a new disease and a custom ingredient. How do these fit into Requiem's disease and alchemy systems?
Setting up a new merchant NPC with a shop — how do I make the vendor and pricing work under Requiem's economy?
Where do I even start patching a creature-overhaul mod for Requiem? I don't know which records matter.
I want a checklist for making any mod Requiem-ready — masters, the keywords the Reqtificator needs, what not to hand-edit.
My mod adds a new standing stone and a shout. How do those slot into Requiem?

should_not_trigger.query: Set the damage and keywords on this one modded sword for Requiem.
Fix this cuirass's armor rating for Requiem's heavy armor cap.
Balance the magicka cost of my new firebolt variant for Requiem.
Add these arrows to Requiem with the right damage and armor-piercing tier.
My bound-weapon spell summons nothing in game — what script does it need?
Add my steel dagger to the bandit loot lists so it spawns in dungeons.
How do I write a SkyPatcher ini to buff all iron weapons?
Why is this Papyrus cloak script tanking my framerate?
Just tell me Requiem's heavy armor body armor-rating cap.
Give this one boss NPC a higher fixed level and stronger perks for Requiem.
